# Pull Request

## Summary
Describe the goal of this change and the user-visible impact.

## Related Issues
- Closes #
- References #

## Change Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / tooling only

## Verification
- [ ] Tests executed
- [ ] Type checks passed
- [ ] Linting clean
- [ ] Docs updated (if user-facing changes)

<details>
<summary>Commands (update as needed)</summary>

```bash
uv run pytest
uv run mypy src tests
uv run ruff check .
```

</details>

## Checklist
- [ ] Contract boundaries respected
- [ ] Backward compatibility confirmed or migration noted
- [ ] Security and sensitive data handled appropriately
- [ ] Performance impact acceptable

## Notes for Reviewers
Optional context, trade-offs, or follow-up work.
